response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in web development, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. However, he completely lacks the mandatory requirement of 5 to 10 years of recent, hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform. His only listed professional C++ experience was a 6-month role over 15 years ago. Additionally, while he has brief exposure to the financial sector, he lacks the required deep domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income systems.
strengths: Over 20 years of diverse software engineering experience, including architecture and full-stack development.
Strong proficiency with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and test-driven development (TDD).
Has some financial sector exposure from his work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, having only 6 months of professional C++ experience from 2007-2008.
No demonstrated experience with C++ on the Windows platform or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
Missing required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Capital Markets.
